title: Round Ceramic Baking Dish Set Of 2 with Handles Oven To Table Ideal for Lasagne/Pie/Casserole/Tapas (5x 14x 19cm/8.5inch) Blue White
features: Versatile Baking Dish Set: A set of 2 vibrant Round-shaped baking dishes that can cater to all your daily cooking needs, from preparing appetisers and desserts to quick meals and eating. Ideal for cooking or preparing dishes such as stews, lasagna, pasta, bread, onions, fries, tiramisus, croutons, soufflés, puddings, pizzas, blueberry clafoutis, cooked eggs and much more. Variety of delicious food.

High-Quality: The baking set allows you to vary your dishes to suit your mood, bake single-portion meals or different dishes each time. The lightweight ceramic is heat-resistant, suitable for various cooking surfaces, with a smooth interior that requires no greasing, is non-stick and easy to clean, microwave and oven safe.

Practical Baking Dish Set: Meets the highest demands in terms of practicality, robustness and temperature resistance. The baking moulds can withstand a high temperature of 240 degrees, and their elegant and compact shape makes them very suitable for daily cooking or gifting. The Round-shaped baking dish set is equipped with double handles to make it easier to carry from oven to table, and they can be stacked to save space.

Easy Care Design: The set of 2 small ceramic baking dishes (5 x 7 x 9 inch) are great for storage and serving, microwave and dishwasher safe. They will look elegant on any dinner table, just needing a quick rinse with hot water and can go straight into the dishwasher when needed.

Variety of Options: Perfectly compatible with hot and cold food, lead-free, no need to worry about scratches and cracks. The smooth bottoms won't mar your wooden table surfaces. We offer a variety of colours and shapes to choose from (such as Pink white, Brown and caramel). Round, Heart, Pumpkin, Rectangular, oval shapes and sets of small moulds.
